title: Levels
why_this_song: Levels by Avicii (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I get a good feeling, yeah
Get a feeling that I never, never, never, never had before, no, no
I get a good feeling, yeah
I get a good feeling, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.excerpt: I get a good feeling, yeah
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feeling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feeling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Levels" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Levels" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
